reasoning: The question asks if Hans Niemann's FIDE ranking will be as high or higher (i.e. numerically <= 15) on three resolution dates compared to October 26, 2025. Given that FIDE rankings update on the 1st of each month, the November 2 and November 25 dates will likely reflect the November 2025 list, while January 24 will reflect the January 2026 list. Based on the empirical base rate of 68% for this type of FIDE ranking question, and factoring in Niemann's general trajectory as an improving/active young player, maintaining or improving his ranking is slightly more likely than dropping. I assign 68% for the near-term November dates (with a slight reduction for the end of November due to general uncertainty and horizon increasing) and draw closer to 50% for the January date (58%), as the further into the future one projects, the more opportunities there are for his ranking to fluctuate downwards due to typical variance in Elo ratings.
